description: A designed dark graphic headed 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with the date '1/27/2025' and 'Buffalo, NY'. It shows a faint background of handcuffs, a name in white text, and a 'CRIME:' line reading 'Murder'. An ICE seal sits at lower left and a red 'BUFFALO' tab at right. There is no candid photo of a person.
